questions.explanation: 'This' is used for one object close to you. 'is' is used with singular.
For one book near you, use 'This is a good book'.
Phone is singular and near, so use 'This is my phone'.
Use 'This is my house' when pointing to the house you are standing in.
Table near you = This is a table.
'This is my bag' — singular, near.
Apple starts with a vowel sound, so use 'an'. 'This is an apple.'
Use 'This is my office' when you are inside the office.
This is a new car — singular noun, near.
Chair near you: This is my chair.
This is my room — you are inside the room.
Old building nearby: This is an old building.
Key in hand: This is my key.
This is a good hotel — you are staying there.
Report you are holding: This is my report.
Important document on desk: This is an important document.
Problem at hand: This is a big problem.
Opportunity in front of you: This is a great opportunity.
Your current job: This is my job.
Plan being discussed now: This is a new plan.
This is my responsibility — present duty.
Difficult task at hand: This is a difficult task.
Laptop on desk: This is my laptop.
Good idea right now: This is a good idea.
Team near you: This is my team.
This (adjective) + book + is good. 'This' modifies 'book'.
This car is new — 'this' describes which car.
Man standing close to you: This man is my friend.
Question on paper: This question is difficult.
Current project: This project is on time.
Question with 'this': Is this your pen?
Question asking about a nearby object: What is this?
Asking ownership of a near object: Whose is this?
Asking origin of near object: Where is this from?
This is very beautiful — describing a near object.
Negative with 'this': This is not correct.
Favorite restaurant nearby: This is my favorite restaurant.
Useful tool in hand: This is a useful tool.
Passport you are holding: This is my passport.
Expensive watch on wrist: This is an expensive watch.
Ongoing presentation: This presentation is very good.

questions.hindi: ये सभी कर्मचारी अच्छा काम कर रहे हैं।
questions.english: All these employees are doing good work.
questions.hint: doing good work = अच्छा काम कर रहे हैं
questions.explanation: Employees working well: All these employees are doing good work.
Past meeting: That meeting was very productive.

questions.hindi: यह प्रोजेक्ट समय सीमा में है।
questions.english: This project is within the deadline.
questions.explanation: On-time project: This project is within the deadline.

questions.hindi: वे लक्ष्य अभी तक हासिल नहीं हुए।
questions.english: Those goals have not been achieved yet.
questions.hint: not achieved yet = अभी तक हासिल नहीं
questions.explanation: Unachieved goals: Those goals have not been achieved yet.

questions.hindi: ये आंकड़े इस महीने के हैं।
questions.english: These figures are of this month.
questions.explanation: Current month data: These figures are of this month.

questions.hindi: वह डेटा पिछले साल का है।
questions.english: That data is from last year.
questions.hint: Last year's data = पिछले साल का
questions.explanation: Old data: That data is from last year.

questions.hindi: यह निर्णय हमारी टीम ने लिया है।
questions.english: This decision has been taken by our team.
questions.explanation: Team's decision: This decision has been taken by our team.

questions.hindi: वे सभी पुराने तरीके अब बदल गए हैं।
questions.english: All those old methods have changed now.
questions.hint: old methods changed = पुराने तरीके बदल गए
questions.explanation: Changed old methods: All those old methods have changed now.

questions.hindi: ये नए नियम कल से लागू होंगे।
questions.english: These new rules will be implemented from tomorrow.
questions.explanation: New rules tomorrow: These new rules will be implemented from tomorrow.

questions.hindi: वह पुराना तरीका अब सही नहीं है।
questions.english: That old method is not correct now.
questions.explanation: Outdated method: That old method is not correct now.

questions.hindi: यह हमारी कंपनी की सबसे बड़ी जीत है।
questions.english: This is our company's biggest win.
questions.explanation: Company's biggest win: This is our company's biggest win.
Strong competitors far: Those competitors are very strong.
Best products: These are our best products.
Memorable past day: That day was very memorable.
Top priority: This work is our priority.

questions.hindi: वे सभी मेरी टीम को जानते हैं।
questions.english: All those people know my team.
questions.explanation: They know our team: All those people know my team.

questions.hindi: ये काम करना मेरी ज़िम्मेदारी है।
questions.english: Doing these tasks is my responsibility.
questions.explanation: Your responsibility: Doing these tasks is my responsibility.

questions.hindi: वह समस्या अब हल हो गई है।
questions.english: That problem has been solved now.
questions.hint: has been solved = हल हो गई है
questions.explanation: Solved problem: That problem has been solved now.

questions.hindi: यह और वह दोनों एक जैसे हैं।
questions.english: Both this and that are the same.
questions.hint: both the same = दोनों एक जैसे
questions.explanation: Both same: Both this and that are the same.

questions.hindi: ये और वे सभी अलग-अलग हैं।
questions.english: All these and those are different.
questions.explanation: All different: All these and those are different.

questions.hindi: यह प्रस्ताव स्वीकार कर लिया गया है।
questions.explanation: Accepted proposal: This proposal has been accepted.

questions.hindi: वे सभी उम्मीदवार बहुत योग्य हैं।
questions.english: All those candidates are very qualified.
questions.explanation: Qualified candidates: All those candidates are very qualified.
Practical suggestions: These suggestions are very practical.

questions.hindi: वह निर्णय सर्वसम्मति से लिया गया था।
questions.explanation: Unanimous decision: That decision was taken unanimously.

questions.hindi: यह मेरे जीवन का सबसे अच्छा दिन है।
questions.english: This is the best day of my life.
questions.hint: best day of life = जीवन का सबसे अच्छा दिन
questions.explanation: Best day: This is the best day of my life.

questions.hindi: वे सभी हमारे लिए बहुत महत्वपूर्ण हैं।
questions.english: All those are very important for us.
questions.explanation: Very important: All those are very important for us.

questions.hindi: ये हमारे सपनों की परियोजनाएं हैं।
questions.explanation: Dream projects: These are our dream projects.

questions.hindi: यह पहला मौका है जब हमने इतना अच्छा किया।
questions.english: This is the first time we have done so well.
questions.explanation: First time doing well: This is the first time we have done so well.

questions.hindi: वे सभी बाधाएं पार हो गई हैं।
questions.english: All those obstacles have been overcome.
questions.explanation: Overcome obstacles: All those obstacles have been overcome.

questions.hindi: ये सभी कदम हमारी सफलता की तरफ हैं।
questions.english: All these steps are towards our success.
questions.explanation: Steps to success: All these steps are towards our success.
